name: Workers' Compensation / Personal Injury Demand Letter
description: A formal demand letter sent by an injured employee to their employer requesting compensation for a workplace accident and resulting damages.
content:
NOTICE OF CLAIM AND DEMAND FOR SETTLEMENT

TO (Employer / Company):
{{employer_name}}
Address: {{employer_address}}

FROM (Employee / Claimant):
{{employee_name}} (ID/SSN: {{employee_id}})
Address: {{employee_address}}

SUBJECT: Demand for compensation arising from a workplace injury sustained on {{formatDate accident_date}}.

STATEMENT OF FACTS:

While employed by your company as a(n) {{job_title}}, I sustained severe injuries during a workplace accident on {{formatDate accident_date}} at the following location: {{accident_location}}.

As a direct result of this incident, I suffered the following injuries: {{injury_details}}. This accident was caused by the failure to provide a safe working environment, lack of proper supervision, and specifically: {{employer_negligence}}.

DEMAND FOR COMPENSATION:

Due to the aforementioned negligence and the resulting loss of earning capacity, medical bills, and physical pain and suffering, I hereby demand compensation as follows:

  • Economic Damages (Medical expenses & lost wages): {{economic_damages}}
  • Non-Economic Damages (Pain and suffering): {{noneconomic_damages}}

I request that the total settlement amount be remitted to me within 14 days of receiving this notice. If a satisfactory resolution is not reached, I am prepared to pursue formal legal action and file a claim with the workers' compensation board and/or civil court.

CLAIMANT

{{employee_name}}
Date: {{formatDate letter_date}}

Signature: ________________

fields.name: injury_details
fields.label: Details of Injury / Disability
fields.placeholder: e.g., Broken arm, 10% loss of earning capacity

fields.name: employer_negligence
fields.label: Details of Employer's Negligence
fields.placeholder: e.g., Failure to provide safety gear
